mapper.sql: aea.id, aea.employee_id, aea.first_time_from, aea.first_time_to, aea.extend1_time_flag, aea.second_time_from, aea.second_time_to, aea.extend2_time_flag, aea.third_time_from, aea.third_time_to, aea.extend3_time_flag, aea.attribute1, aea.attribute2, aea.attribute3, aea.enabled_flag, aea.create_by, aea.create_time, aea.update_by, aea.update_time, aea.rest_day_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.regimea_date as ${tAlias}_regimea_date, ${tAlias}.first_time_from as ${tAlias}_first_time_from, ${tAlias}.first_time_to as ${tAlias}_first_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend1_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend1_time_flag, ${tAlias}.second_time_from as ${tAlias}_second_time_from, ${tAlias}.second_time_to as ${tAlias}_second_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend2_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend2_time_flag, ${tAlias}.third_time_from as ${tAlias}_third_time_from, ${tAlias}.third_time_to as ${tAlias}_third_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend3_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend3_time_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.rest_day_flag as ${tAlias}_rest_day_flag

select
,
from ac_employee_attendance aea, pm_employee pe
mapper.insert: insert into ac_employee_attendance (employee_id, regimea_date, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, rest_day_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regimeaDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{restDayFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_employee_attendance set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, regimea_date = #{regimeaDate,jdbcType=DATE}, first_time_from = #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, first_time_to = #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend1_time_flag = #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, second_time_from = #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, second_time_to = #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend2_time_flag = #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, third_time_from = #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, third_time_to = #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend3_time_flag = #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, rest_day_flag = #{restDayFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update aea set aea.enabled_flag = 0, aea.update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, aea.update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} from ac_employee_attendance aea where aea.enabled_flag = 1
and aea.regimea_date in
#{item, jdbcType=DATE}
and 1 = 2
and aea.employee_id in
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
and 1 = 2
mapper.select:
select fj.job_name,fu.email, pejs_t.dept_id, pe.id as pe_id,pe.name AS pe_name
from pm_employee pe join pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs_t on pe.id = pejs_t.employee_id and pejs_t.date = CONVERT(varchar(100),getdate(), 23) join fnd_job fj on pejs_t.job_id = fj.id and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and (fj.job_name like '%主管' or fj.job_name like '%班长') left join fnd_user fu on pe.id = fu.employee_id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 where 1 = 1
and pe.id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
and EXISTS ( select 1 from ( select distinct pejs.dept_id from pm_employee pe_t join pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs on pe_t.id = pejs.employee_id and pejs.work_attendance_flag = 1 and pejs.workshop_attendance_flag = 1 and pejs.date = CONVERT(varchar(100),getdate(), 23) and pe_t.enabled_flag =1 where not EXISTS ( select 1 from ac_employee_attendance aea where aea.regimea_date = CONVERT(varchar(100), dateAdd(dd, 1, getDate()), 23) and pe_t.id = aea.employee_id ) ) temp where temp.dept_id = pejs_t.dept_id )
